data.title: IGNITE 2026 expands regional event series for CIOs and senior IT leaders amid tech advancements, fostering peer collaboration.
data.description: Amidst rapid technological advancements, CIOs and senior IT leaders are feeling more pressure to effectively implement strategies. There is a rising demand for forums that offer a mix of analyst insight and peer collaboration to address this challenge. The success of Info-Tech LIVE, the flagship event, has emphasized the need for such strategic platforms.

data.title: Stephanie Reed joins Lochner, an Egis Group company, as Program Director, enhancing Program Management Advisory Practice.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Chicago, Lochner, a company owned by Egis Group, welcomes Stephanie Reed, LEED AP, as their new Program Director. Reed's appointment aims to enhance Lochner's Program Management Advisory Practice by offering strategic oversight. This news comes as a significant addition to the firm's team.

data.title: Rady Children's Health OC creates first endowed chair for Integrative Medicine and Wellness with Dr. Michael Weiss as inaugural Clavis Foundation Chair.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Orange, California, Dr. Michael Weiss was appointed as the first Clavis Foundation Chair for Wellness at Rady Children's Health in Orange County (previously CHOC). This position was created through an endowed chair, funded by a substantial donation.

data.title: LEADOPTIK receives FDA clearance for LIA™ system for lung biopsies using silicon photonics; innovative tech.
data.description: SAN JOSE, California - On January 15, 2026, LEADOPTIK, Inc. revealed that its Last Inch Assessment™ (LIA) system has received clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) under the 510(k) regulation. The LIA system is groundbreaking as it is the first globally to leverage silicon photonics imaging technology and specialized software meant to enhance the accuracy and efficiency of measuring...

data.title: Coinbase, the largest U.S. crypto company, flexes its muscles in D.C. as CEO halts a Senate vote on a key crypto bill.
data.description: The CEO of Coinbase, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, successfully halted a scheduled Senate committee vote on a significant cryptocurrency legislation after expressing his reservations. This action underscores the influence wielded by the company in this arena.
Hagar hf reports Q3 2025/26 financial performance.

data.title: SYBO to launch Subway Surfers City; open for pre-registration, global release on Feb 26. Exciting new chapter!
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark, SYBO revealed plans for Subway Surfers City, the latest installment in the popular gaming franchise. Interested players can now pre-register for the game, which is scheduled for a worldwide debut on February 26.

data.title: DALBAR awards highlight top financial firms for customer service excellence; 2025 winners announced.
data.description: Marlborough, Massachusetts - On January 15, 2026, DALBAR, a prominent auditor specializing in assessing customer service within the financial services sector, announced the recipients of the 2025 DALBAR Mutual Fund Service Award. This prestigious award acknowledges the exceptional performance of organizations in delivering superior customer service.

data.title: Richelieu reports strong Q4 results with sales of $510.9M (up 7.3%), 10 acquisitions in 2025 generating $100M in additional sales, totaling $1.96B in sales for the fiscal year 2025 (7.2% increase). EBITDA at $213.9M (6.2% increase) with an EBITDA margin of 10.9%. Net earnings of $85.8M or $1.55 per diluted share. Richelieu completes 100th acquisition, focusing on innovation and growth strategies.
data.description: Richelieu's fourth quarter for 2025 saw a sales increase to $510.9 million, with a 7.3% rise, driven by internal growth of 4.1% and acquisitions contributing 3.2%. Their EBITDA reached $59.2 million, up by 9.1% with an EBITDA margin of 11.6%. Net earnings were $25.6 million. For the full fiscal year 2025, sales hit $1.96 billion, a 7.2% increase with EBITDA of $213.9 million and net earnings of $85.8 million. Richelieu completed 10 acquisitions generating an extra $100 million in annual sales. The acquisitions included three in Canada and three distribution centers in the US. Richelieu's CEO, Richard Lord, expressed pride in the company's growth and announced a 2.2% dividend increase. The company continues to focus on innovation and acquisitions for future growth. With a strong balance sheet and market presence, Richelieu aims to capitalize on opportunities ahead. Richelieu expanded its private brand portfolio with acquisitions targeting the retailers and renovation superstores market segment.

data.title: Omnissa excels in Gartner's Endpoint Management report, scoring 4.95 in Autonomous Use Case, "Leader" in Magic Quadrant 2026.
data.description: Omnissa, based in Mountain View, California, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Unified Endpoint Management (UEM) Tools. The company achieved the highest ranking across all four Use Cases in the Gartner Critical Capabilities for Endpoint Management Tools report. In the Autonomous Endpoint Management Use Case, Omnissa scored 4.95 out of 5.0. This recognition has positioned Omnissa as a Leader in the Magic Quadrant report.

data.title: BZI® in Kanarraville, Utah, celebrates exceptional impact in 2025 on revenue growth, performance, innovations, and community.
data.description: In Kanarraville, Utah, BZI® is celebrating significant milestones in 2025. The company has achieved a remarkable revenue increase and substantial growth in its customer base. In addition, BZI® has excelled in performance, introduced innovative products, received recognition in the industry, fostered a strong company culture, and made valuable contributions to the community. These accomplishments highlight the success and impact of BZI® as it continues to thrive.

data.title: Altitude Marketing's 2026 CDMO Marketing Trends Report surveys 149 leaders on growth, budgets, and agency partners.
data.description: Altitude Marketing from Emmaus, Pennsylvania, recently unveiled its latest findings in the 2026 CDMO Marketing Trends Report. The report is based on a survey conducted with 149 industry leaders, focusing on aspects such as growth projections, budget allocations, and the uptick in collaboration with agency partners.

data.title: CoreSite introduces 400G AWS Direct Connect in Chicago for improved cloud and AI performance, catering to high-bandwidth needs.
data.description: In Chicago, CoreSite has introduced a new 400G AWS Direct Connect service. This offering aims to provide efficient and fast connectivity for AI and business operations, promising high bandwidth and low latency.

data.title: Keysight unveils Machine Learning Toolkit for rapid Device Modeling, PDK Development, reducing time-to-market, enabling faster Co-Optimization.
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, a company is utilizing Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning to speed up the development of Design Technology Co-Optimization. This innovative modeling approach is cutting down the time-to-market significantly, allowing for quicker progress in the development process.
